playlist_title: April 9, 2022 Conference — For a Conference to Establish a New Security and Development Architecture for All Nations

videos.title: Conference Summary: To Establish a New Security and Development Architecture for All Nations
videos.description:
View the conference in its entirety on schillerinstitute.com: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Speakers in order of appearance: 
Plenary Session
Helga Zepp-LaRouche, Founder, The Schiller Institute; Welcome and Keynote Address: “The Need for a New Paradigm.”
H.E. Ambassador Anatoly Antonov, Ambassador of The Russian Federation to the United States: “Prospects for Building a New International Security Architecture.”
Sam Pitroda (U.S./India), Innovator, Entrepreneur and Policy Maker: “The Need to Redesign the World”
Jay Naidoo (South Africa), Cabinet Minister under President Nelson Mandela: “The African Perspective”
Chen Xiaohan (China), Chinese People’s Association for Peace and Disarmament: “A Shared Future for Mankind”
Alessia Ruggeri (Italy), Spokeswoman of the Comitato per le Repubblica, trade  unionist: “For a Europe of the Fatherlands with the Peace of Westphalia”
Amb. P. S. Raghavan (India), former Indian Ambassador to The Russian Federation: “The Indian Perspective.” 

Panel 2 — Economy

Dennis Small (U.S.), Ibero-American Editor, Executive Intelligence Review: “The New Architecture: A Program to Prevent the Starvation of One Billion People Due to the Sanctions”
Prof. Justin Yifu Lin (China), Dean, Institute of New Structural Economics; Dean, Institute of South-South Cooperation and Development; Honorary Dean, School of National Development, Peking University: “China’s BRI: The Rationale and Likely Impacts”
Saeed Naqvi (India), Indian journalist, television commentator and interviewer: “Media Role and Responsibility”
Dr. George Koo (U.S.), retired Business Consultant; Chairman

videos.title: A Call to Protect the Existence of Humanity from a NATO/Russia War
videos.description:
Helga Zepp-LaRouche introduces the intention of the April 9 Schiller Institute conference. 
View the conference in its entirety: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Read and sign our petition calling for a new International Security Architecture: https://bit.ly/3pQiQwh

videos.title: War Must Stop: "Get off this command and control architecture"
videos.description:
Sam Pitroda outlines his vision to "Redesign the World" away from a "command and control architecture" that merely focuses on power grabbing and profits over the general welfare of the whole population. 
View Sam Pitroda's entire speech here: https://youtu.be/VLpRK_XU6hE?t=1935
View the conference in its entirety: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Read and sign our petition calling for a new International Security Architecture: https://bit.ly/3pQiQwh

videos.title: H.E. Ambassador Anatoly Antonov on Finding Solutions to Today's Crisis
videos.description:
H.E. Ambassador Anatoly Antonov, Ambassador of The Russian Federation to the United States,  expresses his appreciation of the role of the Schiller Institute in finding a solution to today's crises. 
View H.E. Ambassador Anatoly Antonov's entire speech here: https://youtu.be/VLpRK_XU6hE?t=1326

videos.title: NATO and Russia Must Negotiate — As Mandela said, It always seems impossible until it's done
videos.description:
Jay Naidoo, cabinet minister under President Nelson Mandela, stresses the urgent need for NATO and Russia to negotiate and end the war. 
View Jay Naidoo's entire speech here: https://youtu.be/VLpRK_XU6hE?t=4737
View the conference in its entirety: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Read and sign our petition calling for a new International Security Architecture: https://bit.ly/3pQiQwh

videos.title: End the West's War Provocations with the Spirit of the Treaty of Westphalia
videos.description:
Alessia Ruggeri, spokeswoman of the Comitato per la Repubblica, trade unionist (Italy), highlights the hypocrisy of the West discussing peace with Russia while supplying Ukraine with weapons. She adamantly supports a Treaty of Westphalia approach to find a solution to the increasingly dangerous situation the world is facing. 
View Alessia Ruggeri's entire speech here: https://youtu.be/VLpRK_XU6hE?t=3810
View the conference in its entirety: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Read and sign our petition calling for a new International Security Architecture: https://bit.ly/3pQiQwh
